title: becium affine
intro: Becium affine, also known as East African basil, is a plant species native to East Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Becium affine include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Becium affine can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
